LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENT BAUER'S INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION, INC.'S MOTION TO DISMISS. RESPONDENT BAUER'S INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION, INC.'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO DISMISS IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT MOVES UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 583.250. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING. THE MATTER IS ORDERED DISMISSED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT BAUER'S INTELLIGENT TRANSPORTATION, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss.

Respondent Bauer's Intelligent Transportation, Inc.'s unopposed Motion To Dismiss is GRANTED.

Respondent moves under Code of Civil Procedure section 583.250. Good cause appearing. The matter is ordered dismissed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
